What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A decorative rooster figurine with an American flag pattern stands behind jars of dried apples and apple butter on a patterned runner. A white ceramic slow cooker pot sits on a counter containing shredded light-brown food. A person's hands reach into the pot to mix and shred the cooked mixture while a yellow aerosol can remains visible in the background.

canonical_answer: An immersion blender purees the chunky mixture until it becomes smooth.
